235475206.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
235475206.jp_real: なるほど、見事なものだな。

211282616.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
211282616.jp_real: パーシヴァルの炎は何か違うな
211282616.english: Your flames are on another level.

23373557.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
23373557.english: What do I know of justice?

306393790.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
306393790.jp_real: おお、すさまじい連撃だ

12243414.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
12243414.jp_real: ココンムソウリュウといったか。空は広いな。
12243414.en_literal: So you're the one they call the "Unrivaled Dragon"? The sky's wide open, isn't it?
12243414.english: The eternal rage style, huh? It's a big world out there.

578778041.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
578778041.jp_real: ガランツァとはまた違う豪快な槍だな
578778041.en_literal: That's a different kind of spear than Gallanza's.
578778041.english: Spear works different from Ghandagoza's, but just as deadly.

964198286.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
964198286.jp_real: これが錬金術の奥義か
964198286.en_literal: So this is the ultimate alchemy?

1025318850.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
1025318850.jp_real: なるほど。そういった剣の使い方もあるのか。
1025318850.en_literal: I see. So that's another way to use the sword.
1025318850.english: Never seen someone wield a sword like that.

499144180.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
499144180.jp_real: あの距離からいるとはな

405527207.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
405527207.jp_real: ガランツァ、楽しそうだな。
405527207.en_literal: Gallanza, you look like you're having fun.

1020504180.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
1020504180.jp_real: 俺の食材は終わらない
1020504180.english: How can I atone for all my sins?

655794523.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
655794523.english: You really like driving yourself into a corner, huh?

783259973.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
783259973.jp_real: お前が背負うのは悪魔の炎か
783259973.en_literal: The burden you bear... is it the flame of a demon?
783259973.english: So your burden... it's the devil's flame?

133232151.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
133232151.jp_real: 空の可能性を俺たちで証明する
133232151.en_literal: We'll prove the possibilities of the sky together.
133232151.english: We are living proof of the potential in these skies.

215850649.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0100
215850649.jp_real: だが、戦いは終わっていないぞ。
215850649.en_literal: But the battle's not over yet.
215850649.english: Sure, but we're not out of the woods yet.

288325659.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
288325659.english: I'll take your word for it.

580020261.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
580020261.jp_real: 期待に応えられるようにする
580020261.en_literal: I'll make sure I live up to your expectations.

297476852.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
297476852.en_literal: Hmph. I'll keep that in mind.

911182964.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
911182964.jp_real: むしろここからが本番だ
911182964.en_literal: Actually, the real battle starts from here.
911182964.english: In that case, let's move to the main course.

882928088.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
882928088.jp_real: 今のはガランツァ事故みだからな。
882928088.en_literal: That was a Gallanza special, you know.

297738018.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
297738018.jp_real: ああ、あんたのおかげでもある
297738018.en_literal: Hah... Thanks to you, I'm alive.
297738018.english: Thanks, Siegfried. You've been a big help.

151094151.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
151094151.jp_real: この勢いを維持するぞ

54458936.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
54458936.jp_real: ああ、みんなのおかげでな

1028938663.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
1028938663.jp_real: それでも俺は償わなければ
1028938663.en_literal: Even so, I have to atone.
1028938663.english: Doesn't mean I've finished my penance yet.

524296238.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
524296238.jp_real: 団長だけでなく、俺もなのか。
524296238.en_literal: Not just the commander... me too?

464285836.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
464285836.jp_real: うん、期待に応えられるようにする。
464285836.en_literal: Hmph. I'll make sure to live up to your expectations.
464285836.english: I know. I'll figure it out.

612762402.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
612762402.jp_real: ああ、この力でみんなを守る
612762402.en_literal: Hah... With this power, I'll protect everyone.
612762402.english: I had to. If I'm to protect this crew.

62439031.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
62439031.jp_real: ああ、この力を利用して空をも守ってやる
62439031.en_literal: Hah! I'll use this power to protect even the sky.
62439031.english: I'll help you protect these skies.

911179145.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
911179145.jp_real: ああ、だが慢心はしない
911179145.en_literal: But I won't let my guard down.
911179145.english: Thanks... but I can do better.

332769648.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
332769648.jp_real: 戦闘に集中しろ、マギネ。

1021605219.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
1021605219.jp_real: トカゲではない。分かってて言ってるだろう。
1021605219.en_literal: I'm not a lizard. You know that, right?
1021605219.english: First of all, it's not a lizard. And you know it.

576885509.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
576885509.jp_real: はぁ…これもみんなのおかげだ
576885509.en_literal: Hah... this is thanks to everyone too.
576885509.english: Couldn't have done it without everyone's help.

717281184.label: PL1900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
717281184.en_literal: I won't let you get away this time either.
717281184.english: I've got first dibs on the next foe.

425949282.label: PL1900_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0600
425949282.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

747823899.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
747823899.jp_real: 星神フラカ、相手になろう
747823899.en_literal: I'll be your opponent, Star God Fragarach.
747823899.english: Primeval God Fureikun. At last we meet.

549240338.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A

549240338.en_literal: You know the difference in our abilities, don't you?
549240338.english: You should know better than to fight me.

672466895.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B

672466895.en_literal: How about giving up now, Gallanza?
672466895.english: Come on, Gallanza. I'd pack it up if I were you.

511563702.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C

511563702.english: Why you still wanna rumble? Fine by me.

810848654.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST

269721185.english: This is a waste of time.

676842924.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST

676842924.english: You'll see the error of your ways... or else.

1018356316.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A

1018356316.en_literal: You'd better not underestimate these guys.

613909976.english: Your swordmanship isn't as perfect as you think.

873593233.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C

873593233.english: You haven't lost a step, Maggie.

210516522.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST

210516522.english: It doesn't have to be this way.

661761850.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
661761850.en_literal: There's always a way to win.

242297369.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C

242297369.en_literal: Let's attack one by one, steadily.

1064009060.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A

430085916.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_B

939205235.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B

939205235.english: I see through your pattern now.

621130754.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C

621130754.english: Don't feel sorry for these machines!

673267245.en_literal: Gallanza, Magi, I'll go ahead for now.

181387113.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B

181387113.english: You don't have a prayer, generals!

621116172.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
621116172.jp_real: これがイドリンクスペシャルだ！

630194061.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
630194061.en_literal: I won't back down even if it's a bad situation.

88130974.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A

364726525.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C

1010531007.english: I remember this darkness. It will never take me again.

85440654.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST

85440654.en_literal: You're dancing to the dragon's tune.

92477811.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
92477811.en_literal: So this is the power of the sword...

998505139.english: Nice hit! Now serve up another!

616281810.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
616281810.english: Fighting with this crew has its perks.

160492237.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
160492237.jp_real: 俺の剣で守ってみせる
160492237.en_literal: I'll protect you with my sword.
160492237.english: I wield this sword to protect the innocent.

786745811.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
786745811.english: I know what I must do.

945913844.en_literal: This is it. The darkness of this realm.
945913844.english: We will rid this skydom of darkness.

85610692.en_literal: What is that woman trying to do?
85610692.english: Mother... what do you hope to accomplish?

461036199.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST

111243190.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
111243190.en_literal: I thank you for your support.

294035650.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
294035650.jp_real: この勢いで突き進むぞ
294035650.en_literal: I'll charge ahead with this momentum!
294035650.english: It can't handle our combined force!

457155064.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST

641023366.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A

221565302.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B

819709436.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
819709436.en_literal: I'll break through with this momentum!

294410452.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
294410452.en_literal: I'm sorry, but I can't provide the requested translation.

429938700.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
429938700.english: Don't do this! It's not too late!

131746917.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
131746917.jp_real: 俺たちで食い止めるぞ！

114613944.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C

114613944.english: We have to break Angra before it opens the gate!

371692840.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
371692840.jp_real: ハハウェ。止めてみせる！

843019804.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
843019804.en_literal: I'll settle this with my own judgment!
843019804.english: I'm done walking in the dark!

312385628.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
312385628.jp_real: もうやめてくれ！ははうえ！

186256241.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
186256241.jp_real: これが絆の力ってやつなのか
186256241.en_literal: So this is what they call the power of bonds?
186256241.english: This power... This is why we stand as one.

46508792.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
46508792.jp_real: ここで帰ってくるのがお前の使命だ
46508792.en_literal: Your destiny is to come back here.
46508792.english: If I know you... then I know you won't give up!

599898692.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
599898692.jp_real: 破壊の龍の力を乗り越えろ！
599898692.en_literal: Overcome the power of the Dragon of Destruction!
599898692.english: Don't succumb to that damn dragon!

175966279.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
175966279.jp_real: お前が為すべき未来を為せ！
175966279.en_literal: Create the future you should create!
175966279.english: Take control of your own future, Id!

272210457.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_A
272210457.english: You fools don't stand a chance!

381410389.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_B

381410389.en_literal: If you're going to interfere, I can't be a hero.
381410389.english: Lay down your arms or forfeit your lives.

15916095.en_literal: I have no choice but to go with brute force.

747053299.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST

361794842.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST

460321847.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST

821008578.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C

821008578.en_literal: I'm sorry, but I'll have to incapacitate you.
821008578.english: Sorry... but there was no other way.

751096341.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A

751096341.en_literal: Now's the time to put my experience to use.

1061768603.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B

1061768603.english: You've come too far to go back now.

8780478.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
8780478.english: I could get used to this.

101435498.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_1

45207333.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
45207333.english: We'll beat the next one even harder!

817731118.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
817731118.en_literal: Leave the next one to me.

740793227.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_1
740793227.english: You don't have to tell me twice.

753009597.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_3
753009597.en_literal: I'll live up to your expectations.

593381321.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
593381321.english: All that, and you pretend to be a jester.

717113155.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
717113155.en_literal: So this is the sword of the guardian...

334074424.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
334074424.jp_real: お前たちは幽霊なのか
334074424.english: Now I'm working with the undead.

581599429.label: PL1900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
